name: ComponentOrders
summary: Pixel component order for channels in the RenderWindow and PostEffects.

enum_values.name: RGBA
enum_values.summary: This is the default (to match Rhino 5)

enum_values.name: RGB
enum_values.summary: This will only access 3 components, even in the case of the RGBA channel

enum_values.name: BGR
enum_values.summary: This will only access 3 components, even in the case of the RGBA channel.

enum_values.name: XYZ
enum_values.summary: For readability when using the Normal XYZ channel. Same as RGB

enum_values.name: ZYX
enum_values.summary: For readability when using the Normal XYZ channel. Same as BGR
